Fun Good Home-Style Bistro

Fun Good

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.5
📍 West District, Taichung📅 2026
Taiwanese Home-Style Set Meals Comfort Food
Fun Good is a cozy home-style eatery tucked into a lane off Jingmei St. in Taichung's West District, built around set meals for one. It's known for wallet-friendly comfort food and earns strong online reviews. Each set comes with a main dish, three classic Taiwanese small sides, seasonal vegetables, and "Tiansheng" premium rice from Taiwan's east coast—a generous, balanced spread even for a solo diner. House specialties include black-garlic beef stir-fried with crispy garlic chips and fresh vegetables, and soy-milk honey-glazed pork in a peanut crust that's crisp outside and juicy within. Round it out with grandma's plump oyster omelette and a fluffy scallion-and-shrimp fried rice. Soups include pork-meatball radish soup and seaweed egg-drop soup, alongside handmade Japanese-style tamagoyaki, fried rice, and stir-fried knife-cut noodles. Dine-in carries a NT$100 per-person minimum, no outside food or drinks, a 60-minute limit at peak hours, and the shop is closed Tuesdays. Perfect for a solo meal or a homey lunch or dinner off the beaten path.

What I ordered

Black-Garlic Beef with Seasonal Vegetables (Set) Soy-Milk Honey-Glazed Crispy Pork Grandma's Oyster Omelette Scallion & Shrimp Fried Rice Pork Meatball & Radish Soup Seaweed & Egg-Drop Soup
